title: COREGO: drug-drug interaction analysis on the efficacy and safety of regorafenib in patients with a sarcoma: pooled analysis of the data from the REGOSARC and REGOBONE trials.
abstract: Regorafenib, an antiangiogenic multikinase inhibitor (MKI), showed antitumour activity in the second line of treatment for sarcomas in the phase II, randomised versus placebo, multicentre clinical trials REGOSARC (NCT01900743) and REGOBONE (NCT02389244). MKIs are drugs with a narrow therapeutic index subject to drug-drug interactions. The co-medications were not included in the trials' analyses.
